## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Abnormal Security and GrowthX teams to discuss content production, SEO performance, and upcoming feature rollouts.](https://fathom.video/share/-w4_aksWn7H5p5UnG3uzWqxikyrt9JKM?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Performance metrics show positive trends** - After initial dip from site migration, GrowthX content is starting to perform well with impressions and clicks trending upward](https://fathom.video/share/-w4_aksWn7H5p5UnG3uzWqxikyrt9JKM?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [**New AI-assembled graphics** need design approval before widespread implementation - Team will get Maria's feedback on the Figma mockups](https://fathom.video/share/-w4_aksWn7H5p5UnG3uzWqxikyrt9JKM?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)
  - [**Production continues** with 10 glossary pages and 10 blog posts planned for this week, plus additional work on AI cyber glossary](https://fathom.video/share/-w4_aksWn7H5p5UnG3uzWqxikyrt9JKM?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)
  - [**New features coming soon** include FAQs integration and LLM mentions/citations tracking to measure Abnormal's visibility in AI search tools](https://fathom.video/share/-w4_aksWn7H5p5UnG3uzWqxikyrt9JKM?tab=summary&timestamp=156.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Update

  - [GrowthX content performance metrics show positive recovery after site migration dip](https://fathom.video/share/-w4_aksWn7H5p5UnG3uzWqxikyrt9JKM?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
  - [Five previously unindexed URLs were indexed May 4-6 and are already showing positive signals](https://fathom.video/share/-w4_aksWn7H5p5UnG3uzWqxikyrt9JKM?tab=summary&timestamp=258.0)
  - [Glossary refresh pages are trending upward, exceeding performance from three months ago](https://fathom.video/share/-w4_aksWn7H5p5UnG3uzWqxikyrt9JKM?tab=summary&timestamp=281.0)
  - [Blog impressions for overall site continue to perform well according to forwarded email](https://fathom.video/share/-w4_aksWn7H5p5UnG3uzWqxikyrt9JKM?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
  - [New dedicated GrowthX dashboard created to track weekly and week-over-week performance metrics](https://fathom.video/share/-w4_aksWn7H5p5UnG3uzWqxikyrt9JKM?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)

### Image/Graphics Implementation

  - [GrowthX created template-based graphics with Abnormal's style using HTML assembly rather than AI pixel generation](https://fathom.video/share/-w4_aksWn7H5p5UnG3uzWqxikyrt9JKM?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)
  - [The system uses fixed backgrounds/templates with AI-generated copy layered on top](https://fathom.video/share/-w4_aksWn7H5p5UnG3uzWqxikyrt9JKM?tab=summary&timestamp=18.0)
  - [Team needs design approval from Maria before widespread implementation in content](https://fathom.video/share/-w4_aksWn7H5p5UnG3uzWqxikyrt9JKM?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)
  - [Jason will create a Figma file for easy review and comments by the design team](https://fathom.video/share/-w4_aksWn7H5p5UnG3uzWqxikyrt9JKM?tab=summary&timestamp=137.0)
  - [Long-term solution would be getting actual style guide assets to ensure perfect alignment](https://fathom.video/share/-w4_aksWn7H5p5UnG3uzWqxikyrt9JKM?tab=summary&timestamp=86.0)

### CMS Access & Publishing Process

  - [Sydney has been waiting 5-7 business days for HR approval to access Abnormal's CMS](https://fathom.video/share/-w4_aksWn7H5p5UnG3uzWqxikyrt9JKM?tab=summary&timestamp=303.0)
  - [Abdallah will follow up with HR team to expedite the process](https://fathom.video/share/-w4_aksWn7H5p5UnG3uzWqxikyrt9JKM?tab=summary&timestamp=694.0)
  - [Current publishing process puts heavy load on Emily who has to manually stage/publish content](https://fathom.video/share/-w4_aksWn7H5p5UnG3uzWqxikyrt9JKM?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)
  - [Team discussed SEO implications of publishing cadence (minimal difference when publishing in bulk)](https://fathom.video/share/-w4_aksWn7H5p5UnG3uzWqxikyrt9JKM?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)

### AI Cyber Glossary Enhancement

  - [Emily requested optimization and expansion of the separate AI cyber glossary](https://fathom.video/share/-w4_aksWn7H5p5UnG3uzWqxikyrt9JKM?tab=summary&timestamp=428.0)
  - [Purpose is to provide cross-linking opportunities for AI-related terms in cybersecurity context](https://fathom.video/share/-w4_aksWn7H5p5UnG3uzWqxikyrt9JKM?tab=summary&timestamp=554.0)
  - [Some glossary entries currently have placeholder pages with no content](https://fathom.video/share/-w4_aksWn7H5p5UnG3uzWqxikyrt9JKM?tab=summary&timestamp=793.0)
  - [Sydney will prioritize filling these empty pages with optimized content](https://fathom.video/share/-w4_aksWn7H5p5UnG3uzWqxikyrt9JKM?tab=summary&timestamp=879.0)

### FAQ Integration Implementation

  - [GrowthX is adding FAQ sections to content](https://fathom.video/share/-w4_aksWn7H5p5UnG3uzWqxikyrt9JKM?tab=summary&timestamp=137.0)
  - [Currently these will be added to body content, but team wants proper component integration](https://fathom.video/share/-w4_aksWn7H5p5UnG3uzWqxikyrt9JKM?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
  - [Emily suggested reaching out to Jennifer via Slack to explore existing module options](https://fathom.video/share/-w4_aksWn7H5p5UnG3uzWqxikyrt9JKM?tab=summary&timestamp=1203.0)
  - [Sydney will provide detailed requirements for the ticket](https://fathom.video/share/-w4_aksWn7H5p5UnG3uzWqxikyrt9JKM?tab=summary&timestamp=303.0)

### LLM Mentions and Citations Tracking

  - [GrowthX is developing capability to track Abnormal mentions in ChatGPT, Perplexity, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/-w4_aksWn7H5p5UnG3uzWqxikyrt9JKM?tab=summary&timestamp=1315.0)
  - [Will create list of prompts that potential customers might use to find email security tools](https://fathom.video/share/-w4_aksWn7H5p5UnG3uzWqxikyrt9JKM?tab=summary&timestamp=1339.0)
  - [Dashboard will show if/how Abnormal is being mentioned in AI search results](https://fathom.video/share/-w4_aksWn7H5p5UnG3uzWqxikyrt9JKM?tab=summary&timestamp=1373.0)
  - Initial testing showed Abnormal appearing as \#1 recommendation for "best email security tool"
  - [Beta version expected in two weeks for feedback](https://fathom.video/share/-w4_aksWn7H5p5UnG3uzWqxikyrt9JKM?tab=summary&timestamp=1393.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jason to send Figma mockups of graphics templates to Emily for design team review](https://fathom.video/share/-w4_aksWn7H5p5UnG3uzWqxikyrt9JKM?tab=summary&timestamp=137.0)
  - [Sydney to continue pursuing CMS access (Abdallah will follow up with HR team)](https://fathom.video/share/-w4_aksWn7H5p5UnG3uzWqxikyrt9JKM?tab=summary&timestamp=694.0)
  - [Sydney to submit specifications for FAQ component implementation to Jennifer via Slack](https://fathom.video/share/-w4_aksWn7H5p5UnG3uzWqxikyrt9JKM?tab=summary&timestamp=1203.0)
  - [GrowthX team to prioritize filling empty AI Cyber Glossary entries](https://fathom.video/share/-w4_aksWn7H5p5UnG3uzWqxikyrt9JKM?tab=summary&timestamp=879.0)
  - [Team to continue content production with 10 glossary pages and 10 blog posts this week](https://fathom.video/share/-w4_aksWn7H5p5UnG3uzWqxikyrt9JKM?tab=summary&timestamp=297.0)
  - [GrowthX to prepare beta LLM mentions tracking capability within two weeks](https://fathom.video/share/-w4_aksWn7H5p5UnG3uzWqxikyrt9JKM?tab=summary&timestamp=1393.0)
